memoryArtifacts.headline: Land of Ralph son of Hubert
memoryArtifacts.description:
Crich was a settlement in Domesday Book, in the hundred of Morleystone and the county of Derbyshire.

It had a recorded population of 6 households in 1086, putting it in the smallest 40% of settlements recorded in Domesday

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy於大約1005年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯也斯時，他的父親Eudes de Rye26歲，母親Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont20歲。他和Albreda Preaux至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾被列為server/steward/dapifer (french for server)。他去世於大約1086年在他的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy于大约1005年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯也斯时，他的父亲Eudes de Rye26岁，母亲Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont20岁。他和Albreda Preaux至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。他在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾被列为server/steward/dapifer (french for server)。他去世于大约1086年在他的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ryes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Reines  .

variants.name: Reines
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Baruch, Meyer.

nameMeanings.name: Hubert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was popular among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain, where it was later reinforced by settlers from the Low Countries. An 8th-century St Hubert succeeded St Lambert as bishop of Maastricht and is regarded as the patron of hunters, since, like St Eustace , he is supposed to have seen a vision of Christ crucified between the antlers of a stag.

variants.name: Hupprecht

en.lifeSummary: When Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy was born about 1005, in Ryes, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Eudes de Rye, was 26 and his mother, Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont, was 20. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Albreda Preaux. His occupation is listed as server/steward/dapifer (french for server) in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He died about 1086, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy est né environ 1005, à Ryes, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Eudes de Rye, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Albreda Preaux. Sa profession de son indiquée est server/steward/dapifer (french for server) à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1086, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy um 1005 in Ryes, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes de Rye 26 und seine Mutter Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont 20. Er hatte mit Albreda Preaux mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als server/steward/dapifer (french for server) in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 1086 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy è nato il circa 1005 nel Ryes, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes de Rye, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Albreda Preaux. La sua occupazione è indicata come server/steward/dapifer (french for server) nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì circa 1086, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandyが約1005年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスリスで生まれた時，父Eudes de Ryeは26歳，母Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumontは20歳であった。彼はAlbreda Preauxとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでの職業はserver/steward/dapifer (french for server)と記録されている。彼は約1086年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy(이)가 대략 1005년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes de Rye(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Albreda Preaux(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 server/steward/dapifer (french for server)이었다. 그는 대략 1086년 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy nasceu aproximadamente 1005, em Ryes, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Eudes de Rye, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Albreda Preaux. Sua profissão aparece como server/steward/dapifer (french for server) em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1086, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy родился около 1005 г. в местности риесь, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes de Rye было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont, 20. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Albreda Preaux.  Он работал по профессии server/steward/dapifer (french for server) в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер около 1086 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy nació aproximadamente 1005, en Ryes, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Eudes de Rye, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Albreda Harcourt de Villes de Beaumont, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Albreda Preaux. Su ocupación registrada era server/steward/dapifer (french for server) en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió aproximadamente 1086, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
